title: cleistanthus stenonia
intro: Cleistanthus stenonia, also known as Tinospora cordifolia or Guduchi, is a plant used in traditional Indian medicine. It is an evergreen climbing shrub native to the tropical regions of Asia. Cleistanthus stenonia has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The herbal preparations of Cleistanthus stenonia, such as decoctions and extracts, have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, and are believed to have immunomodulatory and adaptogenic effects, promoting overall health and well-being.
